response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (45%) falls below our minimum threshold (60%), and our own critical islanding status with high load demands requires preserving available reserves for self-stability rather than outbound sharing.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c2. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.45 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: r0c3 is islanded with critical SoC (45%) and 1.00 kW load. Recent outbound sharing has accelerated battery depletion. Switching to conservative mode to preserve minimum 60% SoC reserve. Will accept only small incremental shares (0.10 kW/tick) to peers, prioritizing self-stability. Urgent need to either restore grid connection or receive inbound energy offers..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
